item.title: High-end intestinal ultrasound versus mid-end systems benchmarked against tandem ileocolonoscopy in inflammatory bowel disease (HUMID): a paired prospective, validating confirmatory study.
item.description: EClinicalMedicine - Intestinal ultrasound (IUS) is redefining inflammatory bowel disease (IBD) monitoring, but global adoption remains limited by the cost of high-end systems. This study evaluated whether widely avail...

item.title: The predictive value of intestinal ultrasound for treatment response in inflammatory bowel disease: a systematic review and pooled data analysis.
item.description: Journal of Crohn's & colitis - Systematic review - Intestinal ultrasound (IUS) is a promising tool for predicting treatment response in inflammatory bowel disease (IBD). We aimed to systematically review existing literature on the predictive value ...
